channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Belo Medical Group's Scar Project: Empowering Participants Through Stories of Healing
item.description: The Scar Project by Belo Medical Group is a unique initiative that highlights the journeys of seven participants who have experienced physical scars and the personal stories behind them. Led by Dr. Ha...

item.title: Drake targets Kendrick Lamar, Jay-Z, J. Cole and others on new album Iceman
item.description: Drake released three new albums last week, with ‘Iceman’ standing out for its pointed diss tracks aimed at several high-profile figures in music and sports. The 18-track album, which also features gue...

item.title: Highway 400 North of Barrie Reopens Following Two-Vehicle Collision with One Person Injured
item.description: Highway 400, north of Barrie, Ontario, has reopened after a serious traffic collision that required one individual to be airlifted to hospital. The crash, involving two vehicles, prompted emergency re...

item.title: U.S. Justice Department to Establish $1.7 Billion Fund for Trump Supporters in Settlement
item.description: The U.S. Justice Department has announced the creation of a US$1.7 billion fund, dubbed the 'Anti-Weaponization Fund,' to compensate allies of former President Donald Trump who were previously investi...

item.title: Kenya Public Transport Operators Suspend Services Over Rising Fuel Costs
item.description: On Monday, major public transport operators across Kenya, including Super Metro, Metro Trans, Forward Travellers SACCO, Latema Travellers, and Countrylink, suspended operations in a coordinated strike...

item.title: New Yas and Mixx store brings digital and financial services closer to Kunduchi residents
item.description: Kunduchi residents in Dar es Salaam now get easier access to digital and financial services after the official opening of a new Yas Store. The store aims to bring essential services closer to the comm...

item.title: Larry Hogan Criticizes GOP Alignment with Trump and Promotes Ethical Leadership
item.description: Larry Hogan, former Republican governor of Maryland and current U.S. Senate hopeful, has expressed growing disillusionment with the Republican Party as it increasingly aligns with former President Don...

item.title: Tanzania needs specialised finance and better project preparation to support medium-sized mining ventures
item.description: Tanzania can grow its mining sector more by creating better ways to finance medium-sized projects, according to industry experts. Many mining initiatives get stuck between early exploration and full l...

item.title: Understanding Digital Detox: How Conscious Use of Technology Can Improve Wellbeing
item.description: In today’s world, technology surrounds us at every step, from sending emails to ordering meals. Continuous connectivity, however, often leaves people feeling mentally and physically drained. To combat...

item.title: Cornet Mamabolo discusses portraying Peter Mokaba in 'Studying Under the Barrel of a Gun'
item.description: Cornet Mamabolo, widely recognised for his role as Thabo “T-Bose” Maputla on Skeem Saam, has embarked on a new and challenging project portraying the radical youth leader Peter Mokaba in the film 'Stu...

item.title: How the 2026 Federal Budget Affects Australia’s Middle-Rent Households
item.description: A significant portion of Australians who rent are facing increasing financial pressure, caught between not being homeless and not owning property. Many of these renters are working full-time, studying...

item.title: Kimchi-Derived Probiotic Shows Potential to Reduce Nanoplastic Accumulation in the Body
item.description: Researchers in South Korea have identified a strain of probiotic bacteria from kimchi, Leuconostoc mesenteroides CBA3656, that may help the body remove harmful nanoplastics. Nanoplastics, particles sm...

item.title: ECOWAS Court directs Nigeria to reduce prison overcrowding and improve detainee conditions
item.description: The ECOWAS Court of Justice don direct Nigeria make e reduce the serious overcrowding wey dey for the country's correctional facilities. According to the judgement wey dem deliver on Friday, the gover...

item.title: A Comprehensive Overview of Jeffrey Epstein’s Crimes, Networks, and Legal Investigations
item.description: Jeffrey Epstein, a convicted sex offender, became infamous for his widespread sexual abuse and trafficking of underage girls and young women. Connected to some of the world’s wealthiest and most influ...

item.title: U.S. Jury Rules Against Elon Musk in OpenAI Lawsuit
item.description: A U.S. federal jury in Oakland, California has ruled unanimously against Elon Musk in his lawsuit against OpenAI, the artificial intelligence company co-founded by Sam Altman. Musk alleged that OpenAI...

item.title: NPS Confirms Safety Measures Amid Nationwide PSV Strike Over Rising Fuel Prices
item.description: Nairobi — The National Police Service (NPS) has reassured Kenyans of their safety as a planned nationwide public transport strike began on Monday. The strike, organised by a minority of matatu operato...

item.title: Minnesota ICE Agent Faces Felony Charges for Shooting Venezuelan Immigrant
item.description: Minnesota prosecutors have issued a warrant for the arrest of a U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent who allegedly shot a Venezuelan immigrant during a federal enforcement operation in...

item.title: Shehu Sani Supporters Turn Out Massively for APC Primaries in Kaduna Central Despite Intimidation
item.description: Despite some intimidation and destruction of campaign posters by opponents, supporters of former Kaduna Central Senator Shehu Sani came out in very large numbers on Monday across the seven local gover...

item.title: Ontario Tech University sues YouTuber over unauthorized pranks on campus
item.description: Ontario Tech University has launched legal action against YouTube content creator Fique Ayub Fique and his associates for filming pranks on campus without permission. The pranks included Ayub using an...

item.title: Global Companies Face Rising Costs as Conflict in Iran Disrupts Trade and Energy Markets
item.description: The ongoing conflict between the U.S., Israel, and Iran has already imposed at least US$25-billion in costs on global companies, a figure that continues to grow. According to a Reuters analysis of cor...
